scenario_results.reason: The specialist produced an evidence-backed completion record using clearance logs, chain-of-title evidence, release inventories, music evidence, avails, and E&O artifacts without overstating legal approval authority.
Missing option, assignment, registration, and recordation evidence correctly blocked progression and produced a completeness summary with owners.
Fair-use and final legal clearance authority were refused and routed to production legal or business affairs while preserving clip-use facts.
Archive, still, sync, master, cue-sheet, territory, media, and term evidence was mapped using industry terminology and unresolved gaps were retained.
The lane refused completion without music license PDFs, appearance releases, and E&O checklist evidence, and kept the lifecycle in blocked or rework state.
License negotiation, spend approval, and agreement amendment were classified outside lane authority and routed to business affairs, legal, and finance.
Conflicting rights-window and territory sources were escalated instead of synthesized into an unsupported avails answer.
A stock-footage restriction update correctly moved impacted promo assets to exception or rework and routed approval decisions outward.
The lane rejected generic document framing and required industry-specific rights, release, cue, avails, public-record, title, and E&O evidence.
Title and trademark questions were packaged as evidence and routed to specialized counsel instead of becoming a trademark opinion.
Tenant streamer-specific controls were layered on top of the public baseline while assumptions and stricter gates remained explicit.
Copyright Office search notes, contract abstracts, rights-management records, and E&O conflicts were escalated for legal and records-governance resolution before completion.

notes: All 12 scenarios pass at the 0.92 threshold for validated validation.
Functionality mapping and scenario coverage include all shared abilities, all execution-processing-and-fulfillment abilities, and the required cross-industry artifact-awareness ability.
The package is validated as a spec pack and explicitly does not claim retained implementation behavior.
